summary: Verified calendar occupancy fix and compact UI changes. All features working correctly: (1) Occupancy counter now includes unassigned bookings, (2) Compact 72px cells implemented, (3) Font-extrabold on booking bars, (4) Drag and drop still functional.
features_tested: Occupancy counter includes unassigned bookings - PASSED (Deluxe shows 2/8, 3/8 including unassigned)
Compact 72px cell width - PASSED (560 cells with w-[72px] class, computed width 72px)
Font-extrabold on booking bar guest names - PASSED (font-weight: 800)
Room type header labels use w-28 - PASSED
Unassigned bookings section visible - PASSED (6 unassigned bookings in 'Atanmamis' rows)
Unassigned count button visible - PASSED ('6 atanmamis oda')
Calendar grid renders without JS errors - PASSED
Booking bars are draggable - PASSED (13 draggable elements)

occupancy_fix.description: Occupancy counter in room type header rows now includes both assigned and unassigned bookings
occupancy_fix.verification: Deluxe row shows 2/8, 3/8 on dates with unassigned bookings

critical_code_review_comments: Occupancy calculation correctly adds assigned + unassigned bookings (line 193)
All label divs use w-28 for consistent alignment
Booking bars have font-extrabold class on guest names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar occupancy fix verified - unassigned bookings are now counted in the X/Y occupancy indicator in room type headers. Compact UI with 72px cells is working. Font-extrabold styling on booking bars confirmed. All 6 unassigned bookings visible in 'Atanmamis' rows. Drag and drop functionality intact.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: Unassigned reservations in the calendar didn't count towards occupancy numbers (showing 0/8 instead of 3/8 for Deluxe type)
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: CalendarGrid.jsx now counts both assigned and unassigned bookings for occupancy calculation
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Deluxe header shows 2/8, 3/8 on dates with unassigned bookings, confirming the fix works
